title: Israeli officials offer their condolences after death of US Senator Lindsey Graham
gist: Israel's entire senior leadership publicly mourned Senator Lindsey Graham as one of Israel's greatest US friends, underscoring the depth of the pro-Israel Senate advocacy lost with his death.

insights.claim: Netanyahu, President Herzog, Defense Minister Katz, Foreign Minister Saar and former PM Bennett all publicly called Lindsey Graham a true friend and one of Israel's strongest supporters.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: The breadth of Israeli tributes signals Graham was a load-bearing pillar of US-Israel political support now vacated.
insights.locator: Israel's prime minister and other leading officials

insights.claim: Netanyahu framed Graham's view that 'the security of Israel and America are inseparable' as his defining legacy.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Reinforces the ideological alignment Israel will seek to replace in the US Senate.
insights.quote: Lindsey understood that the security of Israel and America are inseparable.
insights.locator: Israel's prime minister and other leading officials
